# QA Report — 004-global-keyboard-shortcut-to-focus-task-input

**Status:** APPROVED
**Generated By:** Auto-Claude AI Review
**Date:** 2026-03-09T09:41:45.302Z

## Summary
All three subtasks are implemented correctly. The '/' global shortcut, Escape-to-blur, and visual hint element all satisfy every acceptance criterion from the spec.

## Validations
- Global document keydown listener fires only when '/' is pressed and active element is not INPUT/TEXTAREA/SELECT/contenteditable — prevents interference with task edit inputs
- e.preventDefault() stops '/' from being typed into the input on focus
- Escape key handler added inside the existing #new-task-input keydown listener, calls input.blur()
- Hint element <p class='shortcut-hint'> with styled <kbd>/</kbd> rendered below the add-form with muted color (#aaa) — unobtrusive as specified
- No changes to mobile-specific code; '/' key is not a reserved mobile browser shortcut

## Issues
- No blocking issues found
